acceptance_criteria.text: Partner search is corrected to cover all Shansik locations except Engelsa 154, with mistaken Engelsa leads removed and future self-import prevented.
proof: raw/delete_mistaken_engelsa_leads.json deleted 17 mistakenly created Engelsa leads.
raw/delete_self_leads.json deleted one own-brand self lead and left no remaining self-like names.
raw/final_counts_after_self_cleanup.json shows Engelsa 154 has 0 leads and the four required locations have 47, 36, 33 and 39 leads.
Backend self-candidate filter deployed in src/api/admin_prospecting.py.
gaps: Some Yandex geo queries timed out, but every required non-Engelsa location has imported candidates.

known_gaps: Provider timeouts are recorded under raw/geo_*.json.
